name: MSI MEG X670E ACE E-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 3x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6666+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - M.2 PCI-Express Card - 2x USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - USB 3.2 Gen 2 10Gbps (Type-C Display port) - 10G Super LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E (X670EACE)
shortName: MSI MEG X670E ACE E-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 3x PCIe 5.0 x16
description: High-end AMD AM5 E-ATX motherboard with triple PCIe 5.0 slots, DDR5 support, and 10G networking for gaming and content creation.
